mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_log (chat_id, question, action_type, action_detail, feedback_reason, processed) VALUES (#{chatId}, #{question}, #{actionType}, #{actionDetail}, #{feedbackReason}, #{processed})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review_log WHERE processed = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE review_log SET processed = 1, processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
